column8:
Truffles, JP Nagar has easily become my absolute favourite spot for Sunday brunches. The place never disappoints when it comes to good food, great portions, and a casual vibe that makes you want to keep coming back. This time I visited with my cousins, and it turned out to be such a lovely outing filled with good conversations and even better food.

We ordered quite a spread – butter garlic prawns, spicy chicken fingers, Italian Pasta Alfredo, chicken tikka pizza, Ferrero Rocher shake, and the brownie point frappe. Every dish had its own charm and flavour.

The butter garlic prawns were interesting because I expected them to be very mild and subtle, but they actually had a noticeable kick. It felt like they were adjusted slightly to suit our Indian palate, which made them flavourful and enjoyable nonetheless.

The spicy chicken fingers were perfectly done with just the right balance of heat and crispiness. The chicken tikka pizza was another highlight – a nice fusion with smoky tikka flavours that worked really well on a pizza base.

But the real star for me, as always, was the Italian Pasta Alfredo. It’s genuinely one of my all-time favourites at Truffles. Creamy, comforting, and consistently delicious every single time.

To end on a sweet note, we had the Ferrero Rocher shake and the brownie point frappe, both rich, indulgent, and perfect for chocolate lovers.

What I also love about Truffles is that despite the quality and quantity, the pricing remains quite reasonable. Our bill came to around ₹2000, which is honestly great for the amount of food we had.

Overall, it was such a fun cousins’ outing with great food and a relaxed vibe. Truffles continues to be my go-to place for brunches, and it never fails to live up to expectations.

column8:
Our first visit to Truffles turned out to be an absolutely delightful culinary experience. From the moment we stepped in, the staff were incredibly warm, attentive, and genuinely welcoming, ensuring that every guest felt comfortable and well taken care of. Their service was impressively swift and efficient, making the entire dining experience smooth and enjoyable.

The ambiance deserves a special mention. The restaurant is impeccably clean, beautifully maintained, and carries a lively café-style vibe that feels both vibrant and relaxed. It’s the kind of place that instantly puts you in a good mood — perfect for a casual brunch, a laid-back meal with family, or a fun catch-up with friends. It’s easy to see why this outlet is so popular; the atmosphere is always buzzing with energy.

When it comes to the food, Truffles truly lives up to its legendary reputation. The highlight of the menu is undoubtedly their iconic burgers. The All American Cheese Burger is an absolute showstopper — generously sized, incredibly juicy, and loaded with that indulgent signature cheese burst. For those who enjoy a fusion twist, the Tandoori Chicken Burger is another must-try that perfectly balances smoky Indian flavours with classic burger goodness.

The menu doesn’t stop at burgers. Pasta lovers will definitely appreciate the creamy richness of the Italian Pasta Alfredo, which comes in a generous portion and delivers comfort in every bite. Even the little touches stand out — the complimentary chips served at the beginning were a pleasant surprise and added to the overall hospitality.

And of course, no visit to Truffles is complete without dessert. The Choco Buzz and the Red Velvet Sundae are absolutely irresistible — indulgent, decadent, and the perfect sweet finale to a satisfying meal.

What makes Truffles even more impressive is the value for money. Considering the quality, quantity, and overall experience, the pricing is quite reasonable. A meal for two usually comes around ₹1200, making it a fantastic spot for delicious comfort food that doesn’t burn a hole in your pocket.

Overall, Truffles JP Nagar is a classic crowd-favorite that consistently delivers on flavor, quality, and vibe. Our kids absolutely loved the food, and we thoroughly enjoyed the entire experience. Without a doubt, it’s a place we would happily revisit.

If you’re someone who appreciates juicy burgers, indulgent desserts, vibrant ambiance, and great service, this place is definitely worth adding to your foodie list.

Highly recommended — do visit with your friends and family for an amazing meal or brunch experience. ✨🍔🍟🍨

It’s one the best places to visit if you’re on a budget. The food is amazing and very affordable. This branch’s service time is very slow compared to other branches (MG Road or Koramangala). It has plenty of parking but you might face issue if you come on weekends.

Must try:
Tandoori Chicken Burger
Amhara Chicken Bao
Chicken Lasagna
Classic Chicken Steak
Chicken Wings (in Buffalo Sauce)
All American Veg Burger
French Fries (Buffalo Sauce)

column8:
This place has become our regular go-to place. The food is always tasty and the staff are friendly and attentive. One thing I really like is that they have a good number of veg options on the menu, which makes it easy to try different dishes.

We usually prefer visiting on weekdays because it’s easier to get a table and the place is less crowded.

Some of our regular favorites are the All American Nachos, Peri Peri Fries (saucy), Buffalo Fries, Bianca Pasta, Spicy Overload Pizza, and the All American Veg Burger. For drinks and desserts, we love their Mojito, Hot Chocolate (Hazelnut), Brownie Point cold coffee, and the Bulls Eye Eggless.

Overall, it’s a great spot for good comfort food and a relaxed meal. Definitely a place we keep coming back to.

This place has become our regular go-to place. The food is always tasty and the staff are friendly and attentive. One thing I really like is that they have a good number of veg options on the menu, which makes it easy to try different dishes.

We usually prefer visiting on weekdays because it’s easier to get a table and the place is less crowded.

Some of our regular favorites are the All American Nachos, Peri Peri Fries (saucy), Buffalo Fries, Bianca Pasta, Spicy Overload Pizza, and the All American Veg Burger. For drinks and desserts, we love their Mojito, Hot Chocolate (Hazelnut), Brownie Point cold coffee, and the Bulls Eye Eggless.

Overall, it’s a great spot for good comfort food and a relaxed meal. Definitely a place we keep coming back to.

Good service is as much about attitude as it is about delivery, and this experience really fell short. I hope the management takes note and works on improving customer interaction.

column8:
We had a dinner yesterday. Even though the wait time was above 20mins the staff was really courteous and accommodating all the patrons as per availability. The waitress was quite efficient and did recheck the orders to ensure there is no miss.
Coming to food there are few scope of improvement. I had order a classic steak and a portion of the plate was smashed potato. It was good but not the best for sure.
The chicken popcorn could be better, as there was oil after frying, check the oil temperature once because every dish comes out of the kitchen is an experience for your clients.
The Apple pie, plz work on your pastry sheet, or try not to expose the pie to cold temp. The sheet had become soggy so the feel of the pie was missing. Taste wise the pie was good. Texture wise not.
The garlic bread stole the show and the pizza too was good.

Disgraceful Service – Management is a Joke

If I could give this place zero stars, I would. The level of disrespect here is staggering. The staff purposefully ignored us from the start—no menu, and absolutely no service. We were treated as if we were invisible.

When we finally had enough and tried to confront the manager about the staff's "too-busy-to-care" attitude, it got even more ridiculous. Instead of stepping up or offering a simple apology, the manager literally tried to hide and run away to avoid the conversation.

It’s one thing to have a poorly trained team, but when leadership is that cowardly and unprofessional, there is no hope for the establishment. There is a complete lack of basic courtesy or work ethic here.

Do not waste your time. Avoid this place at all costs.

column8:
I’ve generally had good experiences with this brand, but this particular Truffles outlet was quite disappointing. The staff here seemed noticeably slow, and the overall service was not up to the usual standards.

It’s surprising because other branches are much better in terms of efficiency and customer experience. Not sure why this location is falling behind, but it definitely needs improvement.

column8:
Perfect birthday celebration at Truffles JP Nagar!* 🎉
We hosted my daughter's 14th birthday here  for 10 people and Truffles absolutely nailed it.
*Food*: 10/10 as always. Their burgers, pasta, and thick shakes were a huge hit. The Peri Peri Chicken Steak and Tandoori Paneer Sandwich disappeared in minutes. We pre-ordered a cake and they stored + served it perfectly.

*Service*: Shout to the staff, especially Operations Manager  was quite accommodating who managed our group so well. They helped with table setup, Super patient despite us being a noisy bunch.

*Ambience*: Lively but not too loud - we could actually talk.

*Value*: For JP Nagar, the portions vs price is unbeatableb and everyone left stuffed.

Will definitely come back for more celebrations. Thanks Truffles team for making it memorable!

column8:
Truffles remains a top-tier destination for anyone in the neighborhood craving a truly satisfying Continental feast. The menu is impressively vast, moving far beyond their legendary burgers to offer a sophisticated spread of European-inspired dishes that consistently hit the mark. The real stars of the show are the steaks, which are expertly prepared and pack a flavorful punch. Whether you opt for the classic chicken steak or one of their more robust cuts, the quality of the meat and the richness of the accompanying sauces make for a memorable meal. The atmosphere is vibrant and energetic, striking that perfect balance between a cozy cafe and a bustling urban eatery, making it just as suitable for a quick lunch as it is for a long, indulgent dinner. Combined with their attentive service and that unmistakably pleasant aroma of fresh baking that greets you at the door, it’s easy to see why this spot is a permanent fixture in the local dining scene.
